mapper.select:
SELECT u.id, u.username, u.name, u.email, u.role_id, r.role_code, r.role_name, u.status, u.last_login_at, u.created_at, u.created_by, u.updated_at, u.updated_by, u.deleted FROM user u LEFT JOIN role r ON u.role_id = r.id AND r.deleted = 0
ORDER BY u.created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.password, u.name, u.email, u.role_id, r.role_code, r.role_name, u.status, u.last_login_at, u.created_at, u.created_by, u.updated_at, u.updated_by, u.deleted FROM user u LEFT JOIN role r ON u.role_id = r.id AND r.deleted = 0 WHERE u.id = #{id} AND u.deleted = 0
SELECT username FROM user WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.password, u.name, u.email, u.role_id, r.role_code, r.role_name, u.status, u.last_login_at, u.created_at, u.created_by, u.updated_at, u.updated_by, u.deleted FROM user u LEFT JOIN role r ON u.role_id = r.id AND r.deleted = 0 WHERE u.username = #{username} AND u.deleted = 0

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.password, u.name, u.email, u.role_id, r.role_code, r.role_name, u.status, u.last_login_at, u.created_at, u.created_by, u.updated_at, u.updated_by, u.deleted FROM user u LEFT JOIN role r ON u.role_id = r.id AND r.deleted = 0 WHERE u.email = #{email} AND u.deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user ( username, password, name, email, role_id, status, created_at, created_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{username}, #{password}, #{name}, #{email}, #{roleId}, #{status}, NOW(), #{createdBy}, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET name = #{name}, email = #{email}, role_id = #{roleId}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE user SET password = #{password}, updated_at = NOW(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE user SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE user SET deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW(), updated_by = #{deletedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT r.id FROM role r WHERE r.role_code = #{roleCode} AND r.deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
